hero.description: Assemble specialized Workers to research, create, operate, and deliver together—while you set the direction and stay in control.

mission.checkpointDetail: Your approval is required before the team delivers.

research.goal: Map the market and recommend a direction

steps.scope: Frame the question and success criteria

content.goal: Turn one campaign brief into a complete content package

operations.goal: Run a repeatable operating process and surface exceptions
operations.deliverable: Completed run with an evidence trail

sales.goal: Prepare a focused account plan for the sales team
sales.deliverable: Account brief and reviewed outreach plan

knowledge.goal: Turn scattered team knowledge into a trusted resource

product.goal: Move a product opportunity from evidence to a validated proposal

showcase.title: Build the right team for the work
showcase.description: Choose a goal. Do Worker brings together specialized roles, a shared workflow, and a clear deliverable.

lifecycle.title: From goal to evidence-backed delivery
lifecycle.description: Tickets, Channels, Mesh, and AgentPods keep every assignment coordinated, reviewable, and inspectable.

goal.title: Set the goal
goal.description: Define the outcome, constraints, and owner in a Ticket.

coordinate.title: Coordinate
coordinate.description: Workers share context and divide responsibilities through Channels and Mesh.

review.title: Review
review.description: Pause important decisions at explicit human checkpoints.

deliver.title: Deliver
deliver.description: Receive the result with its status, artifacts, and evidence.

ticket.title: Recommend the next market to enter

channel.name: #market-expansion
channel.activity: 3 Workers coordinating in a shared Channel

checkpoint.decision: Approve the recommended direction before delivery

capabilities.title: Direct every layer of the work
capabilities.description: Organize the team, follow progress, set boundaries, and run repeatable work in one system.

organize.title: Organize
organize.description: Give every Worker a role, an owned task, and the context to move.

observe.title: Observe
observe.description: See what the team is doing and what supports each result.

control.title: Control
control.description: Set access, approvals, and accountability around the work.

operate.title: Operate
operate.description: Run assignments on your infrastructure and repeat what works.

trust.title: Adopt an AI workforce on your terms
trust.description: Keep execution, access, and evidence inside the controls your organization already trusts.

selfHosting.title: Self-hosted execution
selfHosting.description: Use Runners on infrastructure you control.

workspaces.title: Isolated AgentPod workspaces
workspaces.description: Separate each assignment and its working context.

credentials.title: Managed credentials
credentials.description: Scope access to the Worker and task that need it.

audit.title: Inspectable history
audit.description: Retain activity, decisions, and delivery evidence.

compatibility.title: Bring the AI agents you trust
compatibility.description: Coordinate supported agent runtimes through one workforce platform.
